rulings.Case Title: ROBERT LOCKE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Rex Moore Electrical Contractors and Engineers, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff¿s deposition testimony and amended declaration and Ms. Huerto¿s amended declaration create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing concrete refrigeration panels attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s objections to plaintiff¿s declaration are overruled. Defendant¿s objections to the amended declarations of plaintiff and Ms. Huerto are overruled. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DIANE HALL et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant FDCC California, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiffs failed to present any admissible evidence that the Garlock gaskets to which Mr. McEuin was exposed by defendant contained asbestos. Defendant¿s objections to Mr. Ay¿s declaration are sustained. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: NARDINE ALVARADO et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Schneider Electric USA, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiff failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether Mr. Alvarado¿s exposure to asbestos-containing products attributable to defendant was a substantial factor in causing or contributing to any of Mr. Alvarado¿s claimed damages. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS et al VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc. F.K.A Plant Maintenance, Inc. Of California'S Mo To Strike
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 9. Defendant Emil J. Weber Electric Co.¿s joinder to Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc. F.K.A Plant Maintenance, Inc. Of California's motion to strike is denied. The court is unaware of any authority authorizing a joinder to a motion to strike where the joinder is not filed with the required notice for filing a motion to strike. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS et al VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Deft Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc. F.K.A Plant Maintenance, Inc. Of California'S Demurrer To Complt
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 9. Defendant Emil J. Weber Electric Co.¿s joinder to Temporary Plant Cleaners¿ demurrer is overruled. The court is unaware of any authority authorizing a joinder to a demurrer where the joinder is not filed with the required notice for filing a demurrer. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS et al VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 9. Defendant Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc.¿ motion to strike is denied. The agency allegations are sufficiently pled. To the extent that any of the allegations sought to be stricken survive the recent dismissal of the ¿claims arising from the May 2009 diagnosis of asbestosis and asbestos-related pleural disease,¿ a motion to strike is not the appropriate procedure to challenge such allegations. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS et al VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 9. Defendant Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc.¿ demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend. = (220/HEK)
